case_title: DANIEL L. MILLIGAN VS. COREY A. SCOTT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLIGAN, DANIEL L.

APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED FOR PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED FOR DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
